info.name: Task Manager API - Primetrade Assignment
info.description:
Backend Developer Intern Assignment - Task Manager REST API with JWT auth & Role-Based Access Control.

HOW TO USE:
1. Run 'Register' or 'Login' first (no token needed)
2. Copy the 'token' from the response
3. Paste it into the collection variable 'token' (top-right Variables tab)
4. All Task/Admin requests will now use that token automatically

variable.description: Paste JWT token here after Register/Login
ID of the task to Get/Update/Delete

item.name: 1. Auth (No token required)

request.description:
METHOD: POST
PURPOSE: Creates a new user account with role USER by default.
AUTH: Not required.
RETURNS: JWT token + user details. Copy the token for all future requests.

METHOD: POST
PURPOSE: Logs in an existing user and returns a fresh JWT token.
AUTH: Not required.
RETURNS: JWT token + user details.

item.description: Public endpoints - no Authorization header needed

item.name: 2. Tasks CRUD (Token required)

request.description:
METHOD: POST
PURPOSE: Creates a new task owned by the logged-in user.
AUTH: Required (Bearer token).
STATUS VALUES: PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED
RETURNS: 201 Created + the new task (note the 'id' - use it as task_id below).

METHOD: GET
PURPOSE: Returns all tasks belonging to the logged-in user. If the user is ADMIN, returns ALL tasks from every user.
AUTH: Required (Bearer token).
No body needed.

METHOD: GET
PURPOSE: Fetches a single task by its ID.
AUTH: Required (Bearer token). Only the task owner or an ADMIN can view it - others get 403 Forbidden.
No body needed.

METHOD: PUT
PURPOSE: Updates title, description, and/or status of an existing task.
AUTH: Required (Bearer token). Only the task owner or an ADMIN can update it.
RETURNS: 200 OK + updated task.

METHOD: DELETE
PURPOSE: Permanently deletes a task.
AUTH: Required (Bearer token). Only the task owner or an ADMIN can delete it.
RETURNS: 204 No Content (empty body = success).

item.description: All requests here need Authorization: Bearer {{token}} - set the 'token' variable first via Register/Login

item.name: 3. Admin (ADMIN role required)

request.description:
METHOD: GET
PURPOSE: Lists every registered user. Demonstrates role-based access control.
AUTH: Required, and the logged-in user's role must be ADMIN.
If role is USER -> 403 Forbidden (expected, proves RBAC works).
To make yourself ADMIN, run in Postgres:
UPDATE users SET role='ADMIN' WHERE email='your_email';
Then login again to get a fresh token with the ADMIN role.

item.description: Requires role ADMIN - regular USER role gets 403 Forbidden here
